title: jasminum simplicifolium subsp. funale
intro: Jasminum simplicifolium subsp. funale, also known as the Funale Jasmine, is a flowering plant species within the Jasminum genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Funale Jasmine is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
